Title: Pay with authentication (3DS2)
Content:
You need to be fully PCI-DSS level 1 compliant to be allowed to do full PAN integrations

Reach out to Xendit support in case you would like to see this flow activated, we will ask you to provide proof of PCI-DSS level 1 compliance.

Use Case:
Perform a card payment that triggers 3D Secure authentication with a full card number. This flow is used for customer-initiated transactions where strong customer authentication is required. (Guest checkout flow)

  1. Perform the payment request

Request POST v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC", // Indicates whether the transcaction should be captured or not
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "channel_properties": {
    "card_details": {
      "cvn": "123",
      "card_number": "4000000000001091",
      "cardholder_first_name": "cardholderFirstName",
      "cardholder_last_name": "cardholderLastName",
      "cardholder_email": "cardholder_email_address@gmail.co",
      "expiry_month": "12",
      "expiry_year": "2029"
    },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "Goods"
  },
  "description": "Description example",
  "metadata": {
    "metametadata": "metametametadata"
  }
}

Response POST v3/payment_requests

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-UNIQUE_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
    "description": "Description examples",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "metametametadata"
    },
    "created": "2025-07-31T02:29:55.570Z",
    "updated": "2025-07-31T02:29:55.570Z",
    "status": "REQUIRES_ACTION",
    "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
    "channel_code": "CARDS",
    "request_amount": 10000,
    "channel_properties": {
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
        "skip_three_ds": false,
        "statement_descriptor": "Goods",
        "card_details": {
            "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2029",
            "fingerprint": "61a443574a7d750020465c79",
            "type": "CREDIT",
            "network": "VISA",
            "country": "ID",
            "issuer": "PT BANK RAKYAT INDONESIA TBK",
            "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
            "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
            "cardholder_email": "shopper@sample.com"
        },
        "billing_information": {
            "country": "",
            "street_line1": null,
            "street_line2": null,
            "city": null,
            "province_state": null,
            "postal_code": null
        }
    },
    "type": "PAY",
    "actions": [
        {
            "type": "REDIRECT_CUSTOMER",
            "descriptor": "WEB_URL",
            "value": "https://redirect.xendit.co/authentications/688ad524d9cfdab137d7a615/render?api_key=xnd_public_development_kSJeNzbAo6DEkX1poFWVLBsmR0nJ8WnjpdQpf4dfIPXgDBltJmH7CZGVUfWWI"
        }
    ]
}

2. Redirect to the authentication page

Redirect your customer to the authentication page provided by the action_url from the response object. This is where the cardholder completes the 3D Secure authentication.

3. Customer completes authentication

After successfully authenticating, your customer will be redirected to your success_return_url. If authentication fails, they will be redirected to your failure_return_url.

4. Receive the webhook

Xendit will send a payment webhook to your configured webhook endpoint, indicating the final status of the transaction. You can match this webhook with the payment_request_id you stored earlier.

Title: Bayar dengan autentikasi (3DS2)
Content:
Anda harus sepenuhnya patuh pada PCI-DSS level 1 untuk diizinkan melakukan integrasi PAN penuh

Hubungi dukungan Xendit jika Anda ingin alur ini diaktifkan, kami akan meminta Anda untuk memberikan bukti kepatuhan PCI-DSS level 1.

Kasus Penggunaan:
Lakukan pembayaran kartu yang memicu autentikasi 3D Secure dengan nomor kartu lengkap. Alur ini digunakan untuk transaksi yang diinisiasi oleh pelanggan di mana autentikasi pelanggan yang kuat diperlukan. (Alur checkout tamu)

  1. Lakukan permintaan pembayaran

Request POST v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC", // Indicates whether the transcaction should be captured or not
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "channel_properties": {
    "card_details": {
      "cvn": "123",
      "card_number": "4000000000001091",
      "cardholder_first_name": "cardholderFirstName",
      "cardholder_last_name": "cardholderLastName",
      "cardholder_email": "cardholder_email_address@gmail.co",
      "expiry_month": "12",
      "expiry_year": "2029"
    },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "Goods"
  },
  "description": "Description example",
  "metadata": {
    "metametadata": "metametametadata"
  }
}

Respons POST v3/payment_requests

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-UNIQUE_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
    "description": "Description examples",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "metametametadata"
    },
    "created": "2025-07-31T02:29:55.570Z",
    "updated": "2025-07-31T02:29:55.570Z",
    "status": "REQUIRES_ACTION",
    "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
    "channel_code": "CARDS",
    "request_amount": 10000,
    "channel_properties": {
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
        "skip_three_ds": false,
        "statement_descriptor": "Goods",
        "card_details": {
            "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2029",
            "fingerprint": "61a443574a7d750020465c79",
            "type": "CREDIT",
            "network": "VISA",
            "country": "ID",
            "issuer": "PT BANK RAKYAT INDONESIA TBK",
            "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
            "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
            "cardholder_email": "shopper@sample.com"
        },
        "billing_information": {
            "country": "",
            "street_line1": null,
            "street_line2": null,
            "city": null,
            "province_state": null,
            "postal_code": null
        }
    },
    "type": "PAY",
    "actions": [
        {
            "type": "REDIRECT_CUSTOMER",
            "descriptor": "WEB_URL",
            "value": "https://redirect.xendit.co/authentications/688ad524d9cfdab137d7a615/render?api_key=xnd_public_development_kSJeNzbAo6DEkX1poFWVLBsmR0nJ8WnjpdQpf4dfIPXgDBltJmH7CZGVUfWWI"
        }
    ]
}

2. Alihkan ke halaman autentikasi

Alihkan pelanggan Anda ke halaman autentikasi yang disediakan oleh `action_url` dari objek respons. Di sinilah pemegang kartu menyelesaikan autentikasi 3D Secure.

3. Pelanggan menyelesaikan autentikasi

Setelah berhasil melakukan autentikasi, pelanggan Anda akan dialihkan ke `success_return_url` Anda. Jika autentikasi gagal, mereka akan dialihkan ke `failure_return_url` Anda.

4. Terima webhook

Xendit akan mengirimkan webhook pembayaran ke endpoint webhook yang telah Anda konfigurasikan, yang menunjukkan status akhir transaksi. Anda dapat mencocokkan webhook ini dengan `payment_request_id` yang Anda simpan sebelumnya.

Title: ชำระเงินด้วยการยืนยันตัวตน (3DS2)
Content:
คุณต้องปฏิบัติตามมาตรฐาน PCI-DSS ระดับ 1 อย่างสมบูรณ์จึงจะได้รับอนุญาตให้ทำการผสานรวม PAN แบบเต็มได้

โปรดติดต่อฝ่ายสนับสนุนของ Xendit หากคุณต้องการเปิดใช้งานขั้นตอนการทำงานนี้ เราจะขอให้คุณแสดงหลักฐานการปฏิบัติตามมาตรฐาน PCI-DSS ระดับ 1

กรณีการใช้งาน:
ทำการชำระเงินด้วยบัตรที่กระตุ้นการยืนยันตัวตน 3D Secure ด้วยหมายเลขบัตรแบบเต็ม ขั้นตอนนี้ใช้สำหรับการทำธุรกรรมที่ริเริ่มโดยลูกค้าซึ่งจำเป็นต้องมีการยืนยันตัวตนของลูกค้าที่รัดกุม (ขั้นตอนการชำระเงินสำหรับผู้เยี่ยมชม (Guest checkout flow))

  1. ทำการร้องขอการชำระเงิน

คำร้องขอ POST v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC", // Indicates whether the transcaction should be captured or not
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "channel_properties": {
    "card_details": {
      "cvn": "123",
      "card_number": "4000000000001091",
      "cardholder_first_name": "cardholderFirstName",
      "cardholder_last_name": "cardholderLastName",
      "cardholder_email": "cardholder_email_address@gmail.co",
      "expiry_month": "12",
      "expiry_year": "2029"
    },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "Goods"
  },
  "description": "Description example",
  "metadata": {
    "metametadata": "metametametadata"
  }
}

การตอบกลับ POST v3/payment_requests

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-UNIQUE_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
    "description": "Description examples",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "metametametadata"
    },
    "created": "2025-07-31T02:29:55.570Z",
    "updated": "2025-07-31T02:29:55.570Z",
    "status": "REQUIRES_ACTION",
    "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
    "channel_code": "CARDS",
    "request_amount": 10000,
    "channel_properties": {
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
        "skip_three_ds": false,
        "statement_descriptor": "Goods",
        "card_details": {
            "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2029",
            "fingerprint": "61a443574a7d750020465c79",
            "type": "CREDIT",
            "network": "VISA",
            "country": "ID",
            "issuer": "PT BANK RAKYAT INDONESIA TBK",
            "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
            "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
            "cardholder_email": "shopper@sample.com"
        },
        "billing_information": {
            "country": "",
            "street_line1": null,
            "street_line2": null,
            "city": null,
            "province_state": null,
            "postal_code": null
        }
    },
    "type": "PAY",
    "actions": [
        {
            "type": "REDIRECT_CUSTOMER",
            "descriptor": "WEB_URL",
            "value": "https://redirect.xendit.co/authentications/688ad524d9cfdab137d7a615/render?api_key=xnd_public_development_kSJeNzbAo6DEkX1poFWVLBsmR0nJ8WnjpdQpf4dfIPXgDBltJmH7CZGVUfWWI"
        }
    ]
}

2. เปลี่ยนเส้นทางไปยังหน้าการยืนยันตัวตน

เปลี่ยนเส้นทางลูกค้าของคุณไปยัง authentication page ที่ระบุโดย action_url จาก response object นี่คือที่ที่ผู้ถือบัตรทำการยืนยันตัวตน 3D Secure ให้เสร็จสมบูรณ์

3. ลูกค้าทำการยืนยันตัวตนเสร็จสมบูรณ์

หลังจากยืนยันตัวตนสำเร็จ ลูกค้าของคุณจะถูกเปลี่ยนเส้นทางไปยัง success_return_url ของคุณ หากการยืนยันตัวตนล้มเหลว ลูกค้าจะถูกเปลี่ยนเส้นทางไปยัง failure_return_url ของคุณ

4. รับ webhook

Xendit จะส่ง payment webhook ไปยัง webhook endpoint ที่คุณกำหนดค่าไว้ เพื่อระบุสถานะสุดท้ายของการทำธุรกรรม คุณสามารถจับคู่ webhook นี้กับ payment_request_id ที่คุณจัดเก็บไว้ก่อนหน้านี้ได้
SeoTitle: ชำระเงินด้วยการยืนยันตัวตน (3DS2)

Title: Pagar con authentication (3DS2)
Content:
Usted necesita cumplir totalmente con PCI-DSS nivel 1 para que se le permita realizar integraciones PAN completas

Comuníquese con el soporte de Xendit en caso de que desee que se active este flujo; le solicitaremos que proporcione una prueba de cumplimiento de PCI-DSS nivel 1.

Caso de Uso:
Realizar un pago con tarjeta que active la autenticación 3D Secure con un número de tarjeta completo. Este flujo se utiliza para transacciones iniciadas por el cliente donde se requiere una autenticación fuerte del cliente. (Flujo de pago como invitado)

  1. Realizar la solicitud de pago

Request POST v3/payment_requests

{
  "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
  "type": "PAY",
  "country": "ID",
  "currency": "IDR",
  "request_amount": 10000,
  "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC", // Indicates whether the transcaction should be captured or not
  "channel_code": "CARDS",
  "channel_properties": {
    "card_details": {
      "cvn": "123",
      "card_number": "4000000000001091",
      "cardholder_first_name": "cardholderFirstName",
      "cardholder_last_name": "cardholderLastName",
      "cardholder_email": "cardholder_email_address@gmail.co",
      "expiry_month": "12",
      "expiry_year": "2029"
    },
    "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
    "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
    "statement_descriptor": "Goods"
  },
  "description": "Description example",
  "metadata": {
    "metametadata": "metametametadata"
  }
}

Response POST v3/payment_requests

{
    "payment_request_id": "pr-UNIQUE_PAYMENT_REFERENCE_ID",
    "country": "ID",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "business_id": "YOUR_BUSINESS_ID",
    "reference_id": "UNIQUE_REFERENCE_ID",
    "description": "Description examples",
    "metadata": {
        "metametadata": "metametametadata"
    },
    "created": "2025-07-31T02:29:55.570Z",
    "updated": "2025-07-31T02:29:55.570Z",
    "status": "REQUIRES_ACTION",
    "capture_method": "AUTOMATIC",
    "channel_code": "CARDS",
    "request_amount": 10000,
    "channel_properties": {
        "success_return_url": "https://xendit.co/success",
        "failure_return_url": "https://xendit.co/failure",
        "skip_three_ds": false,
        "statement_descriptor": "Goods",
        "card_details": {
            "masked_card_number": "400000XXXXXX1091",
            "expiry_month": "12",
            "expiry_year": "2029",
            "fingerprint": "61a443574a7d750020465c79",
            "type": "CREDIT",
            "network": "VISA",
            "country": "ID",
            "issuer": "PT BANK RAKYAT INDONESIA TBK",
            "cardholder_first_name": "shopperFirstName",
            "cardholder_last_name": "shopperLastName",
            "cardholder_email": "shopper@sample.com"
        },
        "billing_information": {
            "country": "",
            "street_line1": null,
            "street_line2": null,
            "city": null,
            "province_state": null,
            "postal_code": null
        }
    },
    "type": "PAY",
    "actions": [
        {
            "type": "REDIRECT_CUSTOMER",
            "descriptor": "WEB_URL",
            "value": "https://redirect.xendit.co/authentications/688ad524d9cfdab137d7a615/render?api_key=xnd_public_development_kSJeNzbAo6DEkX1poFWVLBsmR0nJ8WnjpdQpf4dfIPXgDBltJmH7CZGVUfWWI"
        }
    ]
}

2. Redirigir a la página de autenticación

Redirija a su cliente a la página de autenticación proporcionada por el action_url del object response. Aquí es donde el titular de la tarjeta completa la autenticación 3D Secure.

3. El Cliente completa la autenticación

Después de autenticarse exitosamente, su cliente será redirigido a su success_return_url. Si la autenticación falla, será redirigido a su failure_return_url.

4. Recibir el webhook

Xendit enviará un webhook de pago a su endpoint de webhook configurado, indicando el estado final de la transacción. Usted puede hacer coincidir este webhook con el payment_request_id que almacenó anteriormente.
